item.title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.
[read more]

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.
[read more]

(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.

item.title: ID Card Designer Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: ID Card Designer Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodelabelmaker
item.itunes:summary:
ID Card Designer Software
(Office Apps)
ID Card Maker Software is easily available at www.barcodelabelmakersoftware.com website which creates most attractive cards with the inclusion of images designing tool like pencil, rectangle, text, picture, line etc. Card Designing Application makes customized product labels with different barcodes and value. ID Card and Label Designing Program uses sequential, random and constant value series for creating most versatile ID cards.
[read more]

item.title: Recovery Files Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recovery Files Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Recovery Files Mac
(Utilities)
Professional and elegant Recovery Files Mac application helps users to restore deleted and lost data from digital removable storage devices on Apple Macintosh system in few mouse clicks. With support of innovative Mac file salvage program users can easily get back their important office documents, precious images, memorable snaps, favorite video clips and family photographs with inbuilt help manual. Mac data revival tools offers versatile features to recover misplaced files and folders from various types of removable media like SDHC card, Thumb drives, Key drives, Pen drives, Digital Audio player, Smart media, SD card, Micro drives, Flash drives, Memory sticks and Handy drives. Mac removable device data restoration utility facilitates user friendly environment to restore files by both technical and non technical users without requiring professional expertise. Technically advanced Mac data rescue application offers preview of all retrieved data before final restoration to recover all or only selected files according to user requirement and save on specified location in Mac computer. Mac removable media data recovery program provides facility to regain corrupted and missing data from different brands of USB removable devices like Transcends, Kingston, Samsung, Dell, PQI, Canon, Sony, Olympus, Nikon and many others in convenient way. A demo version of Recovery Files Mac utility is available on company website for users in free of cost to download and evaluate features before purchasing complete software.Features:* Professional and ultimate tool which facilitates to recover lost data from logically crashed, damaged and inaccessible USB removable drives.* Offers excellent data searching functionalities to safely restore different types of lost data such as photos, images, video clips and text documents.

[read more]

A demo version of Recovery Files Mac utility is available on company website for users in free of cost to download and evaluate features before purchasing complete software.Features:* Professional and ultimate tool which facilitates to recover lost data from logically crashed, damaged and inaccessible USB removable drives.* Offers excellent data searching functionalities to safely restore different types of lost data such as photos, images, video clips and text documents.

[read more]

item.title: Anytype [Notes]
item.itunes:title: Anytype [Notes]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Anytype
(Notes)
Imagine an app where you can do everything: Protect your thoughts & data with end-to-end encryption. Local, on-device encryption. Only you have encryption keys. Offline account creation: control your keys, own your data. No server, no gatekeeper: peer-to-peer sync on local networks.
OFFICIAL APP

NOTE: Im not the developer of this product, im just a provider from other source.
[read more]

OFFICIAL APP

NOTE: Im not the developer of this product, im just a provider from other source.
[read more]

item.title: Recover Mac Deleted Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Mac Deleted Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Mac Deleted Files
(Utilities)
Specialist Recover Mac Deleted Files software offers perfect solution to recover deleted and missing data from USB disk drives on Apple Macintosh computer in simplest and reliable manner. With support of versatile and flexible Mac data salvage application users can get back valuable documents, favorite songs, priceless images, video clippings, memorable snapshots and family photographs in minimal time and cost. Advanced Mac data revival program provides preview facility of retrieved data before final restoration to recover desired files and folders according to user requirement and save on specified location in Mac system. Highly effective and powerful Mac drive recovery application facilitates to restore deleted data from different brands of USB storage devices like Transcends, Kingston, Samsung, PQI, Canon, Olympus and many others in smooth and secure way. Mac USB media data rescue tool is easy to operate and supports interactive working environment to retrieve data by both technical and non technical users without requiring any professional expertise. Company offers trial version of Recover Mac Deleted Files utility on website for users to easily download and understand software capabilities before buying full featured application. Software provides excellent feature to regain missing and lost files even device is crashed, formatted, inaccessible, undetectable or infected by viruses without degrading quality of real data.Features:* Innovative and professional Mac recovery software restores lost files, pictures and video clips from pen drive on Macintosh PC.* Offers advanced disk scanning technology to safely recover deleted and damaged data from USB storage media in few mouse clicks.* Mac pen drive data revival tool effectively works on all popular Mac operating systems like Mac OSX and other Apple Macintosh computer.

[read more]

[read more]

item.title: Barcode Software for Publishers Industry [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Barcode Software for Publishers Industry [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodelabelmaker
item.itunes:summary:
Barcode Software for Publishers Industry
(Office Apps)
Professionally develop www.barcodelabelmakersoftware.com recommends Barcode Software for Publishers to create colorful labels using advance image designing objects like circle, line, pencil, rectangle, ellipse etc. Label maker program is proficient to generate bulk number of bar code labels using sequential, constant and random series. Tag designing application is proficient to create customized labels according to book publishing company requirements.

item.title: Txt Manager [Text Editors]
item.itunes:title: Txt Manager [Text Editors]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
Txt Manager
(Text Editors)
This small application will help you to collect and organize your text files more easily.
Extensions : txt, sh, py, pas, lfm, xml, html, css, php, js, java, perl, asmx, asp, atp, sql, vb

You can :
- Adding Group
- Adding Items
- Export / Import
- Adding Document Password
